ownerFacingRequirement: show me the content queue returns real pending drafts the owner can approve or reject from chat or /web UI

nexiRouter: content queue prompts deterministically run contentQueue
approve content draft prompts run contentQueue then approve, using the pending draft id from the queue result when the owner does not paste an id
reject content draft prompts run contentQueue then rejectContentDraft
content queue prompts do not route to campaignQueue or searchEmail
webUi: /web Job Desk now includes an M5 Content Queue card
card loads /api/content/queue and filters approval_pending drafts
approvalBoundary: approve marks the content draft publish_ready and approval item approved
reject marks the content draft rejected and approval item rejected
publishing remains deferred; no GBP/Meta/WordPress publish is executed

newNamedCases: Nexi content tools draft, list, approve, reject, and summarize without executing publish
content routes expose queue approve and reject decisions for the web UI
Nexi content queue prompts route to content queue approve and reject tools
